name: Die Fantastischen VR - Fantaventura
developer: gebrueder beetz filmproduktion, High Road Stories
short_description: "Fantaventura" is a trip to a psychedelic fantasy island with the legendary German rap group DIE FANTASTISCHEN VIER. The band takes you into the parallel world of their 1993 hit song "Tag am Meer" (A Day at the Beach). Here, time and place are stretched, and nothing is as it seems.
detailed_description:
"Fantaventura" is an extraordinary fantasy island in the middle of the ocean. The sun is burning as you walk the beach and encounter dancing plants, colourful animals, and floating soap bubbles.

Mysteriously, you are stranded on this island with the legendary German rap group DIE FANTASTISCHEN VIER. In a hypnotic blend of volumetric video, animations, 360 video and interactive sound, their 1993 hit "Tag am Meer" (A Day at the Beach) becomes a new virtual reality.

 Relax, listen to the beats, and visit the worlds inside the bubbles by sticking your head in. Use the trigger on your controller to grab objects or to beam them towards you.

Duration: up to 45 minutes.
